Instructions: Layer 200g Greek yogurt with 1/2 cup mixed berries, 2 tbsp granola, 1 tbsp chia seeds. Top with 1 tsp honey.
Whisk 3 eggs with salt and pepper. Sauté 1 cup spinach and 1/2 cup mushrooms. Pour eggs over vegetables and cook until set.
Mix 1/2 cup oats, 1 cup almond milk, 1 tbsp chia seeds, 1/2 cup berries. Refrigerate overnight. Top with 1 tbsp almond butter.
Toast 2 slices whole grain bread. Mash 1/2 avocado with lemon juice. Top with 2 poached eggs and cherry tomatoes.
Blend 1 scoop protein powder, 1 banana, 1/2 cup berries, 1 cup spinach, 1 cup almond milk. Top with granola and seeds.
Cook 1/2 cup quinoa. Top with 1/4 cup blueberries, 2 tbsp almonds, cinnamon, and 1 tbsp maple syrup.
Crumble 200g firm tofu. Sauté with 1 cup mixed vegetables, turmeric, nutritional yeast, salt, and pepper.
Blend 1 cup cottage cheese, 2 eggs, 1/2 cup oats, 1 tsp vanilla. Cook on griddle. Serve with berries.
Mix 3 tbsp chia seeds with 1 cup almond milk, 1 tsp vanilla. Refrigerate 4 hours. Top with 2 tbsp sliced almonds.
Toast 1 whole grain bagel. Spread 2 tbsp light cream cheese. Top with 3 oz smoked salmon, capers, and red onion.
Mash 1 banana with 2 eggs and 1 scoop protein powder. Cook pancakes. Top with 1 tbsp peanut butter.
Whisk 6 eggs with diced bell peppers, onions, spinach. Pour into muffin tins. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
Toast 2 slices whole grain bread. Spread 2 tbsp almond butter. Top with sliced banana and chia seeds.
Mix 1 cup protein powder, 2 eggs, 1/2 cup oats, 1 cup milk. Cook in waffle maker. Top with Greek yogurt.
Cook 1/2 cup oats with water. Add diced apple, cinnamon, 1 tbsp walnuts, and 1 tsp honey.
Scramble 2 eggs. Fill whole wheat tortilla with eggs, 1/4 cup black beans, salsa, and 2 tbsp cheese.
Blend 1 banana, 2 tbsp peanut butter, 1 cup milk, 1/2 cup oats, 1 tbsp flax seeds, ice.
Mix protein powder, oat flour, eggs, berries, Greek yogurt. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes.
Simmer tomatoes, peppers, onions, spices. Create wells and crack 3 eggs. Cover and cook until eggs set.
Cook 1/2 cup buckwheat groats with almond milk. Top with berries, cinnamon, and 1 tbsp hemp seeds.
Cook 2 turkey sausages. Serve with sautéed spinach and 1 slice whole grain toast.
Mix 3 tbsp chia seeds with coconut milk. Top with mango, shredded coconut, and 1 tbsp almonds.
Dip 2 slices whole grain bread in mixture of 2 eggs and 1 scoop protein powder. Cook and top with berries.
Blend 2 cups spinach, 1 banana, 1/2 avocado, 1 scoop protein powder, 1 cup almond milk, ice.
Cook quinoa in almond milk. Top with mixed nuts, dried fruit, cinnamon, and 1 tsp honey.
Scramble 4 egg whites. Fill whole wheat wrap with egg whites, spinach, tomatoes, and 2 tbsp salsa.
Mix 1 cup ricotta with vanilla. Top with mixed berries, 1 tbsp honey, and 2 tbsp granola.
Mix spinach, arugula, cherry tomatoes, cucumber. Top with 2 poached eggs, avocado, and balsamic vinegar.
Mix oats, protein powder, mashed banana, almond butter, dark chocolate chips. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes.
Dice and roast 1 sweet potato. Sauté with peppers, onions, and turkey sausage. Top with 1 fried egg.
Mix chia seeds, oats, nut butter, honey, dried fruit. Press into pan. Refrigerate and cut into bars.
Cook red lentils. Top with sautéed vegetables, 1 poached egg, and tahini drizzle.
Blend 2 eggs, 1 scoop protein powder, 1/4 cup milk. Cook thin crepes. Fill with Greek yogurt and berries.
Roast chickpeas with spices. Serve with whole grain toast, avocado, and cherry tomatoes.
Blend 1 cup kefir with frozen berries. Top with granola, chia seeds, and sliced almonds.
Scramble 3 eggs with diced vegetables (peppers, onions, tomatoes, spinach). Season with herbs.
Halve bell peppers. Fill with scrambled eggs, black beans, and cheese. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
Serve 1.5 cups high-fiber cereal with 1 cup milk, 1/2 banana, and 1 tbsp ground flax.
Serve 4 oz grilled salmon with quinoa, sautéed kale, and 1 poached egg.
Fill corn tortillas with scrambled eggs, black beans, salsa, avocado, and cilantro.
Mix raw oats, nuts, seeds, dried fruit. Serve with Greek yogurt and fresh berries.
Bake banana bread with protein powder, whole wheat flour, eggs, mashed bananas, walnuts. Serve 1 slice.

Grill 6 oz chicken breast. Serve over mixed greens with cherry tomatoes, cucumber, chickpeas, balsamic vinaigrette.
Combine cooked quinoa, roasted vegetables, chickpeas, tahini dressing, and mixed greens.
Fill whole wheat wrap with 4 oz turkey breast, avocado, lettuce, tomato, mustard.
Simmer red lentils with carrots, celery, onions, vegetable broth, cumin, and turmeric.

Simmer beans, pasta, tomatoes, zucchini, carrots, celery, vegetable broth, Italian herbs.
Fill whole wheat pita with grilled chicken, hummus, cucumber, tomatoes, lettuce, tahini.
